[[File:IthDefender.png|thumb|right|150px|Ithorian guardian armor chestplate]]
The '''Ithorian guardian armor''' was a type of [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]] used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:P11" /> It offered a high degree of protection against energy-based weapons like [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] but lesser protection from kinetic damage.<ref name="SWG:CU" /> The complete armor set included helmet, chest plate, left & right biceps, left & right bracers, gloves, leggings and boots. It was available in several different colors. The Ithorian guardian armor was clearly designed to fit an Ithorian body type and could exclusively be worn by members of this [[Species/Legends|species]]. Two other models of Ithorian armor were the [[Ithorian defender armor|Ithorian defender]] and the [[Ithorian sentinel armor|Ithorian sentinel]] armors.<ref name="SWG:P11" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Ithorian guardian armor appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:P11" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Ithorian guardian armor was added to the game with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 11 Notes for 21 October 04|Publish 11]]," on [[October 21]], [[2004]].<ref>{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=archive%202004|text=Publish Archive 2004}}</ref>
